response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video to identify the two songs being performed by the VTuber Laplus Darknesss. 2. Identified '天ノ弱' (Amanojaku) by 164 and '気まぐれメルシィ' (Kimagure Mercy) by 八王子P via on-screen text. 3. Performed web searches using '[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics' for both. 4. Compiled the information into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A 2-song concert performance by the VTuber Laplus Darknesss. The performance includes talk segments in a subway setting and a white-background studio setting. The songs performed are '天ノ弱' (Amanojaku) and '気まぐれメルシィ' (Kimagure Mercy).

scenes.description: VTuber Laplus Darknesss performs '天ノ弱' (Amanojaku) in a concert stage setting. '天ノ弱' and '164' credits appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
僕がずっと前から思ってる事を話そうか 
友達に戻れたらこれ以上はもう望まないさ 
君がそれでいいなら僕だってそれで構わないさ 
嘘つきの僕が吐いた はんたいことばの愛のうた 
今日はこっちの地方はどしゃぶりの晴天でした 
昨日もずっとひまだった 
別に君の事なんて考えてなんかいないさ 
嫌だ、ちょっと本当は考えてたかもなんて 
めりごーらんどみたいに 回る 
僕の頭の中が 回る 
ぐるぐる 
こぼれ落ちた 
君にもらった愛のその溢れるほど 
どこに捨てようか 
限りのある僕のこの心で 
パンクしちゃうから 
友達に戻れたらこれ以上はもう望まないさ 
君がそれでいいなら僕だってそれで構わないさ 
嘘つきの僕が吐いた 
てっせいのよわむし 
このろーてーから 
こぼれそうなの 
君にもらった愛のその溢れるほど 
どこに捨てようか 
限りのある僕のこの心で 
パンクしちゃうから 
そんなのどうでもいいんだ 
あてがわるわけないから 
そんなのどうでもいいんだ 
まだ 
まだ 
まってよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shall I tell you what I've been thinking for a long time? 
If I can be your friend once again, 
I won't ask for more than this. 
If you are fine with that, I am fine with that too. 
This is a love song of 'contrary words' that I, the liar, have spat out. 
Today, the weather in this region was a pouring sunshine. 
Yesterday too, I spent the whole day just like that. 
I don't think about you at all, 
In reality, I have never even thought about it. 
It's just like me to spin it like a merry-go-round. 
My head is spinning around, around. 
Drip, drip, it's overflowing. 
Even more than the overflowing love that you have given me, 
I wonder where I should throw it all away. 
My heart, with its limited capacity, 
Is about to collapse. 
If I can be your friend once again, 
I won't ask for more than this. 
Even if this fragile heart of mine breaks, 
It doesn't matter anymore.
